2266440.name: TRICK
2266440.description:
TRICK is a game about reliving Halloween night as a group of teenage troublemakers. Play with up to 3 friends in this ridiculous first-person open world adventure. 

Skateboard around the streets of your hometown on Halloween. Throw eggs at windows, toilet paper your teacher's house, start fires, set up pranks, and cause as much havoc as possible on the greatest night of the year!

Key Features

  • Up to 4 player co-op gameplay with proximity voice chat

  • A non-linear open world to explore

  • A town full of interactable NPCs to help or hinder

  • Quests to complete and collectibles to obtain at your own pace

  • Secrets to discover

  • Toilet paper, eggs, firecrackers, and other tools for vandalism
2266440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
